scripts.check: node scripts/lint.mjs && node --test test/*.test.mjs && node scripts/smoke.mjs && node scripts/browser-smoke.mjs && node scripts/build.mjs
scripts.check:bun: bun scripts/lint.mjs && bun test test/*.test.mjs && bun scripts/smoke.mjs && bun scripts/browser-smoke.mjs && bun scripts/build.mjs
